div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100vh; font-family: sans-serif;
border: 4px solid #f3f3f3; border-top: 4px solid #2563eb; border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; animation: spin 1s linear infinite; margin: 0 auto 20px;
color: red; margin-top: 20px; font-size: 14px; display: none; max-width: 80vw; word-break: break-all; padding: 10px; background: #fee2e2; border-radius: 10px;
